name: Healthcare Prior Authorization
description: Clinical criteria for prior auth approval
problem: Manual prior auth reviews delay patient care.
story: Patient completed PT, imaging, and meets high-severity criteria for lumbar procedure.

data_sources.name: CMS LCD L33738 (demo pattern)
data_sources.note: Synthetic facts modeled on open patterns; no PII

data_sources.name: HL7 FHIR Claim resource
data_sources.note: Synthetic facts modeled on open patterns; no PII

rules: IF PhysicalTherapyDone(p) AND PainOver6Weeks(p) AND XrayCompleted(p) AND SeverityHigh(p) THEN PriorAuthApproved(p)
IF SpecialistRequired(p) AND NotSecondOpinion(p) THEN PriorAuthDenied(p)

default.label: Approved — criteria met
default.explanation: Clinical criteria satisfied for prior authorization.
